# HttpFixer

> Free browser-based web app security fixers. Every tool fetches your live URL, detects your stack, and generates the exact copy-paste config to fix each issue. No backend, no signup, MIT licensed.

HttpFixer is part of the MetricLogic network (metriclogic.dev).

## Tools

- HeadersFixer: https://httpfixer.dev/headers/ — Audits security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, COOP, COEP). Generates stack-specific fixes for Nginx, Apache, Vercel, Cloudflare, Express, Caddy, Next.js, FastAPI.
- CORSFixer: https://httpfixer.dev/cors/ — Sends live OPTIONS preflight, detects misconfiguration type, generates middleware fix for Express, Nginx, FastAPI, Django, Laravel, Cloudflare Workers, vLLM, Ollama.
- OAuthFixer: https://httpfixer.dev/oauth/ — Diagnoses OAuth/OIDC errors (invalid_grant, redirect_uri_mismatch, PKCE errors). Generates provider-specific fixes for Auth0, Okta, Cognito, Google, Microsoft.
- CSPFixer: https://httpfixer.dev/csp/ — Fetches your page, extracts all resource origins, generates a working Content Security Policy. Detects gaps and unsafe-inline usage.
- EdgeFix: https://httpfixer.dev/edge/ — Audits caching headers (Cache-Control, Vary, Age, X-Cache). Detects accidentally cached authenticated responses.
- SpeedFixer: https://httpfixer.dev/speedfixer/ — Fetches live Google PageSpeed Insights results, detects stack, generates exact config to fix failing audits. Fixes for Nginx, Cloudflare, Vercel, Apache, Netlify, WordPress.

## Recent content

- Blog: SharePoint CSP "Refused to Load" Fix — https://httpfixer.dev/blog/sharepoint-csp-fix-2026/

## Standards referenced

- HSTS: RFC 6797
- CSP: W3C CSP Level 3
- CORS: Fetch Living Standard
- Referrer Policy: W3C Referrer Policy
- PKCE: RFC 7636
- Cache-Control: RFC 7234
- OWASP Secure Headers Project: https://owasp.org/www-project-secure-headers/
